panels.description: Per-tier cache hit rate. Total hit rate = (L1+L2+L3) / (L1+L2+L3+Miss). Each tier's share uses raw token counts without page alignment.

targets.expr: (sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l1_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l2_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l3_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))) / clamp_min((sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l1_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l2_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l3_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:uncached_prompt_tokens_histogram_sum{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))), 1e-9)

sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l1_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min((sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l1_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l2_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l3_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:uncached_prompt_tokens_histogram_sum{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))), 1e-9)

sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l2_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min((sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l1_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l2_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l3_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:uncached_prompt_tokens_histogram_sum{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))), 1e-9)

sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l3_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min((sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l1_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l2_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:cache_hit_tokens_l3_total{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (rate(sglang:uncached_prompt_tokens_histogram_sum{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))), 1e-9)

panels.title: Cache Hit Rate (Per-Tier)

panels.description: Host-tier (L2) KV cache utilization (0-1). Only populated when HiCache is enabled.
panels.title: HiCache Host Utilization

panels.description: Host-tier used / total capacity, in tokens. Only populated when HiCache is enabled.
panels.title: HiCache Host Used / Total Capacity (tokens)

panels.description: L3 storage prefetch (L3->Host DRAM) and writeback (Host DRAM->L3) rates, tokens/s.
panels.title: HiCache L3 Prefetch / Writeback Rate (Host<->Storage)

panels.description: L1 (GPU) KV cache eviction rate (dropped without HiCache, written to L2 with it) and load-back rate from L2 (Host) to GPU, tokens/s.
panels.title: HiCache L1<->L2 Eviction / Load-back to GPU Rate

panels.description: Rate of tokens served from cache, tokens/s, including HiCache hits.
panels.title: Cached Tokens Rate (hit tokens/s)

panels.description: GPU KV cache utilization (0-1). Higher utilization means HiCache is more likely to kick in.

targets.expr: avg without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (sglang:gpu_kv_cache_occupancy{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name",engine_type=~"decode|unified"})
avg without (dp_rank, tp_rank, pp_rank, moe_ep_rank, instance, job) (sglang:token_usage{instance=~"$instance",model_name=~"$model_name",engine_type=~"decode|unified"})

panels.title: GPU KV Cache Utilization

panels.description: Distribution of L1->L2 PCIe write bandwidth (logical KV bytes / CUDA event duration), GB/s. Reflects actual GPU->Host transfer rate.
panels.title: HiCache L1->L2 PCIe Write Bandwidth (GB/s)

panels.description: Distribution of L2->L1 PCIe load bandwidth (logical KV bytes / CUDA event duration), GB/s. Reflects actual Host->GPU transfer rate.
panels.title: HiCache L2->L1 PCIe Load Bandwidth (GB/s)

panels.description: L3 storage read/write bandwidth. Write = Host->Storage (backup), Read = Storage->Host (prefetch).
panels.title: HiCache L3 Storage Read/Write Bandwidth
